div1.entryFree: Cattle, domestic beasts: a reverend man that grazed his c. nigh, Compl. 57. he blasts the tree and takes the c. Wiv. IV, 4, 32. to bring the ewes and the rams together and to offer to get your living by the copulation of c. As III, 2, 85. boys and women are for the most part c. of this colour, As III, 2, 85 make poor men's c. break their necks, Tit. V, 1, 132.
